compiled_state.title: T4: add --output to read/report commands (list-epics/ready/summary/check-ac/quality-check/fsck/bridge-fsck)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: Add --output json to the report commands that today emit text/TSV/id-list. Shapes per epic inventory. Preserve list-epics exit 0/1/2. Reuse centralized helper. ready already JSON-capable via T2.

comments.body:
TARGETS (derived; to be confirmed). Story = add `--output json` to read/report commands that emit text/TSV/id-list today. Depends on T2 (reuses ticket-output.sh).

ENGINE:
- ticket-list-epics.sh — --output json -> {p0_bugs[],epics[{id,alias,priority,title,children_count,blocking,blocked,blockers[]}]}; PRESERVE exit 0/1/2 (1=none, 2=all blocked).
- ticket-ready.py — ready json already added under T2 (--output json array); confirm shape here.
- issue-summary.sh (summary) — --output json -> [{ticket_id,status,title,blocking_summary}].
- check-acceptance-criteria.sh (check-ac) — --output json -> {verdict,criteria_count,reason}.
- issue-quality-check.sh (quality-check) — --output json -> {verdict,line_count,keyword_count,ac_items,file_impact,reason}.
- ticket-fsck.sh (fsck) — --output json -> {issues:[{kind,ticket_id?,filename?,detail}],fixed[],issue_count}.
- ticket-bridge-fsck.py (bridge-fsck) — --output json -> {orphaned[],duplicates[],stale[]} (findings dict already exists internally).
- rebar dispatcher usage strings for each.

LIBRARY/MCP: check_ac/quality_check currently return {passed,output}; reconcile with engine --output json (GateResult). summary/list-epics/fsck/bridge-fsck library wrappers + MCP tools.
TESTS: per-command --output json tests; list-epics exit-code preservation tests.
SCHEMAS (coordinate w/ T1): list_epics, summary, gate_result (check-ac/quality-check), fsck, bridge_fsck.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
TARGETS — VERIFICATION CORRECTIONS (Explore audit). Script map ALL CORRECT. Findings:
* ticket-fsck.sh prints findings INLINE (CORRUPT:/MISSING_CREATE:/WARN:/PUSH_PENDING: ...). --output json requires refactoring it to ACCUMULATE findings into an array then emit once at the end (data is all there; it's a structure change, not new data).
* ticket-bridge-fsck.py ALREADY builds {orphaned[],duplicates[],stale[]} via audit_bridge_mappings() — just add --output json to emit the dict instead of _format_report() text. Easy.
* list-epics exit codes to PRESERVE: 0=unblocked epics exist, 1=no epics, 2=all blocked (ticket-list-epics.sh ~:394-405). Also fsck exit 0/1 preserve.
* READY shape RESOLVED: ready --output json = JSON ARRAY of full TicketState (same element as list/search), NOT id-list — matches current --json behavior. (ready's --output handled in T2; T4 just confirms shape.)
* LIBRARY/MCP GAPS — no rebar.summary(), no rebar.list_epics(), no bridge-fsck lib/MCP wrapper. check_ac/quality_check return {passed,output} today. SCOPE DECISION NEEDED (see story-level question): whether to add lib/MCP parity wrappers + whether check_ac/quality_check switch to the structured shape (breaking) or stay {passed,output}.
* Dispatcher usage strings (create/list-epics/summary/check-ac/quality-check/fsck/bridge-fsck) need --output documented.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: SCOPE DECISIONS (proceeding on recommended defaults; user dismissed the prompt): (1) ADD full library + MCP parity for summary/list-epics/bridge-fsck (rebar.summary/list_epics/bridge_fsck + MCP tools w/ typed outputSchema) — matches epic cross-interface AC + coverage guard. (2) check_ac/quality_check library+MCP SWITCH to the structured schema-backed shape ({verdict,criteria_count,reason} / {verdict,line_count,keyword_count,ac_items,file_impact,reason}); breaking pre-1.0 lib API change, single shape across CLI/lib/MCP. Both recorded for T1/T4 implementation.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: DONE (commit pending). --output json on list-epics/summary/check-ac/quality-check/fsck/bridge-fsck + lib parity (summary/list_epics/bridge_fsck) + MCP tools. Gates switched to structured shape (breaking): lib returns {verdict,...,passed}; MCP GateResultOut typed. fsck json = re-run text scan + transform tags (scan logic untouched). 4 schemas (gate_result/summary/list_epics/fsck) + conformance + exit-code preservation tests + probe section. Full suite 1297 passed; probe 141.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
